full_text:
Yi Ji (Jibo) 伊籍 (機伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yi Ji (伊籍), styledJibo (機伯), was born in Shanyang. Received favour comparable to Mi Zhu, helped compile the administrative code. Yi Ji was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom.
